user_prompt: Conceptual framework for Safety-Aware Vehicle Routing in Quick Commerce. Flowchart showing three input layers: 'Platform Algorithms' (VRPTW, Multi-objective optimization), 'Environmental Data' (OpenStreetMap, iRAD accident data, real-time traffic), and 'Behavioral Factors' (Rider incentives, income targeting, fatigue). Arrows from these three layers point to a central box 'Safety-Aware Routing Engine'. The engine points to 'Optimized Safe Routes' at the bottom. Use professional colors (blue, green, orange) and clean lines.
